title: Private Equity Outlook Webinar 2025
content:
## Private Equity Outlook Webinar 2025
Join us for our annual Private Equity Outlook webinar, where McCarthy Tétrault's Private Equity team takes stock of the lessons learned in 2024 and explores opportunities ahead for 2025. Based on our 9th annual Private Equity Outlook , this Q&A session will highlight key industry trends across Canada’s principal markets that are setting the pace for the year ahead. Topics include:
- 2024 in Numbers — Canadian Private Equity Overview
- Tariff Update and Trade Landscape – Impacts on Private Equity
- AI and Private Capital in Canada – Context and Legal Outlook
- Canadian Take-Privates in 2024 and Looking Forward
- The Next Frontier of Fundraising
- The New Era of Competition Enforcement: What It Means for Private Equity
- Major League Gains: Private Equity Investment in the North American Sports Industry
- Canadian Tax Issues for Private Equity Investors
Speakers: Matthew Cumming , Maureen Gillis , Heidi Gordon , Martha Harrison , Mathieu Laflamme , Patrick McCay , Debbie Salzberger , and Patrick M. Shea .
Moderated by: Gianluca Mazzanti
This program qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec . Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be sent a few days before the event.
